case_title: GRETA HERMANN VS. PENTATHLON PRODUCTIONS LLC DBA BLUE SKY CAFE et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERMANN, GRETA AS TO DEFENDANT PENTATHLON PRODUCTIONS LLC DBA BLUE SKY CAFE LEE SR, JOSEPH A AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
